intro: Cute, fearless, and packing heat! The girls TPS is back with toon rendering, cel-shading, and full-throttle action. Second class is officially in session!
description:
Built on the latest cartoon rendering and cel-shading tech, every stage pops with vivid anime-film visuals and hard-hitting action. Girls Force 2: Rising Academy is a slick third-person shooter starring two powerhouse girl agents, AERIE and YURI, on a high-stakes mission to take down the shadowy organisation "Dark Siren". From the glam of a downtown fashion show to the grit of a harbour container base, the chase is on. One veteran's instincts. One prodigy's brains. Together, they'll shut Dark Siren down for good.

・Cutting-edge toon rendering and cel-shading tech delivers jaw-dropping anime visuals and cinematic flair from start to finish.
・Hunt down Dark Siren's secret routes across action-packed missions spanning a downtown fashion show and a harbour container base.
・Earn Gold by clearing stages and cash it in for cute, one-of-a-kind costume sets for AERIE and YURI.
・Score an exclusive original wallpaper every time you unlock a new costume because the hype never stops.
・Bust out SHOW Mode with any costume in your collection to uncover even more secret original wallpapers!
・Tap AERIE and YURI directly to unlock their hidden personalities, from bubbly and energetic to surprisingly shy.
・Build out your Gallery collection with bold, distinctive character illustrations and make it your own.
・Check out every costume from every angle in the fully rotatable 360-degree Character Viewer.
・Clear the full story to unlock the long-awaited ending and uncover the shocking truth behind Dark Siren plus a secret only AERIE and YURI know!

Do not sleep on them! Heart-pounding gunfights, a conspiracy-fueled story, costume grinding, wallpaper unlocks, gallery collecting, and a mind-blowing ending are all waiting for you. The next level visual-style TPS is here. Download Girls Force 2: Rising Academy now and take back the city with the most badass duo around!

Prologue
One night, an emergency alert blasted through Girls Force Academy headquarters.
An unidentified organisation had ripped classified data straight out of the Academy and started unleashing chaos across the city.
Behind it all was a new organisation nobody had ever heard of.
Cold, ruthless ambition hiding behind a beautiful face... "Dark Siren".
The government moved fast, calling in their two most reliable agents on the spot.

A packed fashion show, lights blazing.
A woman owning the runway felt an urgent transmission buzz through her earpiece.
Her name was AERIE.
First-gen graduate of Girls Force Academy and a living legend in the field.
Deadly combat instincts wrapped in an irresistible presence.
The second the show wrapped, she vanished quietly from the dressing room.
"Here we go again. Wonder who they're pairing me with this time."

At that same moment, deep in the Rising Academy library.
A woman alone between towering shelves of tactical manuals glanced down at her buzzing phone.
Her name was YURI.
The Academy's sharpest rising star, known for her razor analytical mind and unbreakable focus.
And the person who looked up to AERIE more than anyone alive.
Her eyes locked on the orders on her screen, burning with quiet fire.
"Real field work. Finally. With my senior calling the shots... bring it on."

Two different places. One shared mission.
Two sets of footsteps became one.
A veteran's instincts and a prodigy's intellect.
Wherever these two show up, the song of Dark Siren goes silent.

Code name "Rising Force".
Girls Force Academy! Second Class, Now In Session!!!
